_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your details.
_notes: loop_interval_minutes: how often to sync in --loop mode (default 5).
window_minutes: how far back each loop tick pulls swipes (default 10, overlaps to avoid gaps).
sync_days: used in one-shot --days mode only.
RECOMMENDED: Run continuously with:  node sync.js --loop
This syncs every 5 minutes automatically — no Task Scheduler needed.
Get your api_key from the ERP: HR & Admin → ESSL Sync → Agent Setup tab.
